name: Kanban
description: Allows agents to interact with the Kanban board: search tasks, pick up free-pick tasks, update status, and release tasks.
author: Evonic

variables.name: create_task_super_only
variables.label: Create Task (Super Agent Only)
variables.description: When enabled, only super agents can create new tasks. Regular agents will be denied.

variables.name: edit_task_super_only
variables.label: Edit Task (Super Agent Only)
variables.description: When enabled, only super agents can edit task title, description, or priority. Status updates remain controlled by the assignee check.

variables.name: delete_task_super_only
variables.label: Delete Task (Super Agent Only)
variables.description: When enabled, only super agents can delete tasks. Regular agents will be denied even before the human-approval prompt.
